  "findings": [
    "Forms are not oiled/coated with a release agent prior to concrete placement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Apply an approved form-release agent to all contact surfaces before placing reinforcement or pouring concrete."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to ACI 347, formwork surfaces must be treated with a form-release agent before concrete placement to prevent bonding, ensure clean stripping, and protect the concrete surface from damage. Failing to oil the forms at the rough-complete stage before pouring will result in surface defects and difficulty removing the forms.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 Guide to Formwork for Concrete"
  ]
}
